largest_wick_range_label: Using the printed high and low values, what period label has the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
Find the candle with the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}. What is its period label?
Compare high minus low for all candles. Which label has the {extremum_phrase} range?
What period label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
smallest_wick_range_label: Using the printed high and low values, what period label has the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
Find the candle with the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}. What is its period label?
Compare high minus low for all candles. Which label has the {extremum_phrase} range?
What period label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
largest_body_range_label: Using the printed open and close values, what period label has the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
Find the candle with the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}. What is its period label?
Compare the absolute close-open body sizes for all candles. Which label has the {extremum_phrase} body size?
What period label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
smallest_body_range_label: Using the printed open and close values, what period label has the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
Find the candle with the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}. What is its period label?
Compare the absolute close-open body sizes for all candles. Which label has the {extremum_phrase} body size?
What period label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {range_kind_phrase}?
close_after_body_increase_value: For period {target_label}, keep the open value fixed and preserve the candle direction. If the open-close body size were {change_past_phrase} by {change_value} units, what close value would result?
Keep period {target_label}'s open value unchanged and keep its up/down direction. After its open-close body size is {change_past_phrase} by {change_value} units, what is the close value?
Using period {target_label}, keep the open value fixed and {change_verb} only the open-close body size by {change_value} units while preserving direction. What is the new close?
If candle {target_label} kept the same open value and direction, but its open-close body size were {change_past_phrase} by {change_value} units, what close value should it have?
For candle {target_label}, leave the open value fixed, preserve direction, and {change_verb} the open-close body size by {change_value} units. What is the resulting close value?
close_after_body_decrease_value: For period {target_label}, keep the open value fixed and preserve the candle direction. If the open-close body size were {change_past_phrase} by {change_value} units, what close value would result?
Keep period {target_label}'s open value unchanged and keep its up/down direction. After its open-close body size is {change_past_phrase} by {change_value} units, what is the close value?

For candle {target_label}, leave the open value fixed, preserve direction, and {change_verb} the open-close body size by {change_value} units. What is the resulting close value?

query:largest_wick_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact period label as a string
query:largest_wick_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], running along the answer candle's high-low wick line

query:smallest_wick_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact period label as a string
query:smallest_wick_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], running along the answer candle's high-low wick line

query:largest_body_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact period label as a string
query:largest_body_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], running vertically through the answer candle's open-close body

query:smallest_body_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact period label as a string
query:smallest_body_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], running vertically through the answer candle's open-close body

query:close_after_body_increase_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value
query:close_after_body_increase_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the target candle body

query:close_after_body_decrease_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value
query:close_after_body_decrease_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the target candle body
